# Juhuri Heritage - מורשת ג'והורי

> Interactive Juhuri-Hebrew dictionary and cultural preservation platform for the Mountain Jewish (Juhuri) language.

## About

Juhuri Heritage is an open community platform dedicated to preserving the Juhuri language (also known as Judeo-Tat, ISO 639-3: jdt), spoken by Mountain Jews (Gorskie Yevrei) from the Caucasus region. The platform provides digital tools for language learning, cultural preservation, and community connection.

## Main Features

- **Dictionary**: 26,000+ Juhuri-Hebrew entries with translations, transliterations, phonetics, and example sentences. Search by Juhuri, Hebrew, or Russian.
- **AI Tutor**: Interactive AI-powered language tutor for learning Juhuri, with conversation practice and grammar explanations.
- **Recipes**: Traditional Caucasian Jewish recipes with ingredients, instructions, and cultural context.
- **Marketplace**: Community marketplace for Caucasian food vendors and home cooks.
- **Community Graph**: Interactive visualization of community connections and family relationships.

## Languages

- Primary interface: Hebrew (he)
- Content languages: Juhuri (jdt), Hebrew (he), Russian (ru)
- The Juhuri language uses both Hebrew and Latin scripts

## Key URLs

- Homepage: https://jun-juhuri.com/
- Dictionary search: https://jun-juhuri.com/word/{term}
- Recipes: https://jun-juhuri.com/recipes
- Marketplace: https://jun-juhuri.com/marketplace
- AI Tutor: https://jun-juhuri.com/tutor
- Sitemap: https://jun-juhuri.com/sitemap.xml

## API

- Dictionary search: GET /api/dictionary/search?q={query}&lang={he|juhuri|ru}
- Dictionary entry: GET /api/dictionary/entry/{term}

## Contact

This project is maintained by the Juhuri Heritage community.
Website: https://jun-juhuri.com
